title: June Favorites
excerpt: Hope you had a wonderful holiday weekend if you're in the States! Having Monday off definitely makes today feel a bit off. For the most part I enjoyed the weekend with my little family and didn't work too much. But…
body:
Hope you had a wonderful holiday weekend if you're in the States! Having Monday off definitely makes today feel a bit off. For the most part I enjoyed the weekend with my little family and didn't work too much. But I did finish filming and editing my June Favorites video and posted it to my YouTube channel. So excited we are almost at 30,000 subscribers - thank you!!
